case_title: SIMAS, MARY VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY SIMAS, MARY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIMAS, MARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $900.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $920.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
THIS CLAIM IS AGAINST A GOVERNMENT AGENCY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-18-1998, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO DEC-01-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
